title: Soulbound
description: Undertale / Deltarune / Earthbound combat system with RPG elements and more!
body:
![Soulbound Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ed161905723bfc58680b7c8d63ec9bd85fd3f0ea.png)


Soulbound: Turnbattle is a massive overhaul mod which turns Minecraft into a turn-based RPG with a hybrid of Earthbound, Deltarune, and Undertale mechanics!

(Some of the screenshots may not be entirely accurate to the base mod by itself, like for example the buttons in battle use vanilla button textures, which means you can change them with a resource pack. This mod was designed for a modpack, but can be used on its own!)

This mod also features a Roguelite mode.

You can enter our Discord through our social link on the Modrinth page or by [Clicking Here!](https://discord.gg/XVBc9tfAWS)

## Default Hotkeys

- "M" for Menu
- "G" for Inspect
- "R" for Summon Soul

## Features:

> * UTDR Combat, featuring Graze, TP, and turn-based bullet hell combat.
> * Rolling Health
> * Very deep RPG mechanics, with Stat Points, Soul Trait Passives, Custom Equipment System, Weapon Appraisal (supports modded weapons and anything that has an attack damage stat), A skill tree, a bestiary, and more! (default: M)
> * Multiple game-modes, specifically Normal and Rogue-Lite. Want to play a run-based deck builder which allows you to build special builds and mix-match skills you could never use before in the normal game? You got it!
> * Class system featuring skills and mechanics from Earthbound, Deltarune, and Undertale, as well as a custom class that revolves around casting magic based on your Soul Trait
> * Interact system (default: G) which allows you to interact with certain blocks and environments for flavor text
> * Multiplayer support featuring co-op battles which support an unlimited amount of players
> * NPC Party Member system for solo players, as the game is balanced around 2+ players. Allows you to level up and build a separate party member alongside yourself. You CAN play solo however. (wip)
> * Multi-Enemy Battles
> * Enemy type which features different soul mechanics and bullet patterns. Can view each enemy type in the Bestiary (if the bullet color wasn't enough)
> * Custom mercy system, lower enemy HP to a certain percent or use a mix of different skills to defeat your enemies without killing them.
> * Boss beacon structure that lets you face raid bosses solo or with a group with high stats and several lives, with a difficulty selection that grants a higher amount of loot.
> * Four different elements on different enemies.
> * General mod support around the board
> * And much more!
